history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game-like “Level Up” interface screen shows a profile icon and progress stats with a level bar and several numeric counters.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a centered user interface panel labeled “LEVEL UP!” at the top, with a large title “Hutao Assisten 1,” a level progress indicator, and XP-related statistics displayed in boxes.

Setting:
This appears to be an on-screen UI graphic on a dark, gradient background with no visible real-world setting, presented like a game menu or dashboard.

Visual Details:
The background is a dark purple to near-black gradient. At the very top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in gold/yellow with small decorative diamond shapes on both sides. A large rounded rectangular panel sits in the middle with a faint outline and darker interior. Near the top of the panel, “Hutao Assisten 1” appears in large white text, with a small rounded badge “#8” to the right. Under the title, “LEVEL PROGRESS” is shown in smaller uppercase text. On the left side is a circular avatar containing a stylized illustration and red/pink tones; the inner design includes visible red text-like elements, though the exact small text is unclear. In the center are two prominent rounded rectangles: one labeled “LEVEL” with the number 4 inside, and another labeled “EXPERIENCE” with “10 / 250” inside. Below them is a long horizontal progress bar in dark gray with a colored fill on the left and a “4%” value on the right. Beneath the progress bar are three smaller rounded boxes labeled “MESSAGES” with “93,” “XP NEEDED” with “240,” and “NEXT LVL” with “5.” A faint line of text near the bottom center of the panel reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” in very light gray, though it is subtle.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Hutao Assisten 1
#8
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
4
EXPERIENCE
10 / 250
4%
MESSAGES
93
XP NEEDED
240
NEXT LVL
5
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image shows a dark-themed “Level Up” UI screen with a profile avatar and level progress details for “Hutao Assisten 1.” It displays the current level, experience progress toward the next level, and counters for messages, XP needed, and the next level number.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

4%

# Notes
- The text **“AssistEn”** appears as written in the screenshot (may be a stylized/typoed form of “Assistant”).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
